sections.changelog:
1.9.2

Multi-count habits show their daily target as a badge superscript — Brush Teeth ×2 with badge B reads B² (the retired twin-column numbering's look, now meaning "times per day"; a merged twin's leftover trailing digit is folded into the letter so sups don't stack). The habit sheet narrows to 10 columns: `habit_max` seeds at 10 and a one-time migration nudges a stored 12 down to 10 (wider, squarer cells; deliberate API changes stick).
